name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Deleted
notes: This Building Block defines virtual machine deletion events.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Deleted on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Virtual Machine Deletion Attempt, Audit.Virtual Machine Deletion Success
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Deleted on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Virtual Machine Deletion Attempt, Audit.Virtual Machine Deletion Success
